title: An Act relative to the modernization of state agency information technology systems

abstracts.abstract: By Mr. Crighton, a petition (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 31) of Brendan P. Crighton for legislation to modernize state agency information technology systems.  Advanced Information Technology, the Internet and Cybersecurity.

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Advanced Information Technology, the Internet and Cybersecurity

related_entities.name: committee on Advanced Information Technology, the Internet and Cybersecurity

actions.description: Hearing scheduled for 07/10/2025 from 01:00 PM-05:00 PM in A-2
Bill reported favorably by committee and referred to the committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

related_entities.name: committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently
the committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently
